recommendations.title: Puss in Boots: The Last Wish
recommendations.overview: Puss in Boots discovers that his passion for adventure has taken its toll: He has burned through eight of his nine lives, leaving him with only one life left. Puss sets out on an epic journey to find the mythical Last Wish and restore his nine lives.

recommendations.title: Trolls Holiday

recommendations.title: Ne Zha 2

recommendations.title: Onward
recommendations.overview: In a suburban fantasy world, two teenage elf brothers embark on an extraordinary quest to discover if there is still a little magic left out there.

recommendations.title: The Super Mario Bros. Movie
recommendations.overview: While working underground to fix a water main, Brooklyn plumbers—and brothers—Mario and Luigi are transported down a mysterious pipe and wander into a magical new world. But when the brothers are separated, Mario embarks on an epic quest to find Luig

recommendations.title: Abominable
recommendations.overview: A group of misfits encounter a young Yeti named Everest, and they set off to reunite the magical creature with his family on the mountain of his namesake.

recommendations.title: Wish Dragon
recommendations.genres: Animation, Family, Comedy, Fantasy, Romance, Adventure
recommendations.overview: Determined teen Din is longing to reconnect with his childhood best friend when he meets a wish-granting dragon who shows him the magic of possibilities.

recommendations.title: Trouble
recommendations.overview: A pampered dog named Trouble must learn to live in the real world while trying to escape from his former owner's greedy children and must learn how to survive on the big-city streets.

recommendations.title: The Jetsons Meet the Flintstones
recommendations.genres: Animation, Family, Science Fiction, TV Movie, Comedy
recommendations.overview: Elroy Jetson invents a time machine that takes him back to prehistoric times, where he meets the Flintstone family.

recommendations.title: Nimona
recommendations.genres: Animation, Family, Adventure, Fantasy, Comedy, Action, Drama, Science Fiction
recommendations.overview: A knight framed for a tragic crime teams with a scrappy, shape-shifting teen to prove his innocence.
